query_title: Doctor Who: The Waters of Mars

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: The Next Doctor
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, TV Movie, Mystery, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: The Doctor arrives in Victorian London. It's Christmas, but snow isn't the only thing descending on the tranquil and jubilant civilization, as familiar silver giants from an alternate reality are amassing in numbers. The Cybermen are on the move agai

recommendations.title: Sea Fever
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Horror, Drama, Science Fiction, Mystery
recommendations.overview: The crew of a West of Ireland trawler—marooned at sea—struggle for their lives against a growing parasite in their water supply.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: Last Christmas
recommendations.overview: The Doctor and Clara face their Last Christmas. Trapped on an Arctic base, under attack from terrifying creatures, who are you going to call? Santa Claus!

recommendations.title: Toxic Shark
recommendations.overview: A tropical singles retreat takes a terrifying turn when guests realize a poisonous shark is infesting the surrounding water. Not only will it rip apart its victims, but it also uses projectile acid to hunt - in and out of the water.

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: Invaders from Mars
recommendations.overview: A boy tries to stop aliens that have taken over his town and are brainwashing its inhabitants.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Dead
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, TV Movie, Thriller, Fantasy, Mystery
recommendations.overview: A meeting in a London bus with jewel thief Lady Christina takes a turn for the worse for the Doctor when the bus takes a detour to a desert-like planet, where the deadly Swarm awaits.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: Voyage of the Damned
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, TV Movie, Mystery, Drama, Thriller
recommendations.overview: When disaster hits the Titanic, the Doctor uncovers a threat to the whole human race. Battling alongside aliens, saboteurs, robot Angels and a new friend called Astrid, can he stop the Christmas inferno?

recommendations.title: Fascists on Mars
recommendations.overview: In 1938 a group of fascists led by the general Gaetano Maria Barbagli decides to invade the planet of Mars.

recommendations.title: Zenon: The Zequel
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Zenon Kar is 15 and lives on a space station which the military has taken over and is dismantling. She receives a mysterious signal and must convince everyone that it's from aliens who have come to help them.
